rationale: Gov't Code §2306.066 governs complaint procedures for the Department of Housing and Community Affairs. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The department shall prepare information of public interest describing the functions of the department and the procedures by which complaints are filed with and resolved by the department.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns agency complaint handling, unrelated to homestead exemption.
